opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking button, no online booking tools, and phone-only contact detected on site.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered, sending urgent leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling widget to capture and confirm appointments 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: Just Plumbing has 54 Google reviews with a 4.5 rating and zero owner responses detected.
opportunities.observation: Ignored reviews signal low engagement, risking reputation erosion in a trust-driven trade.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized Google review replies using AI trained on plumbing service context.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected, and the business relies entirely on phone contact.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call leaves zero record, losing potential Boise plumbing customers forever.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and follow up every call.
